message:
test(policy): add surface matching and override precedence tests

Add two policy engine tests:

1. Case-insensitive surface matching: verify that a rule with
   surfaces: ["MCP"] matches PolicySurface::Mcp, confirming the
   engine normalizes surface names during evaluation

2. Explicit surface override precedence: verify that when an MCP
   actor sets .with_surface(PolicySurface::Mux), a mux-surface
   allow rule takes precedence over an mcp-surface deny rule,
   confirming that explicit surface annotation overrides the
   actor-default surface inference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
